title: caucalis platycarpos subsp. muricata
intro: Caucalis platycarpos subsp. muricata, commonly known as the prickly-fruited caucalis, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing anxiety and stress, alleviating menstrual cramps, and treating digestive issues. Caucalis platycarpos subsp. muricata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is sometimes used in traditional medicine to support overall well-being.
